title: Yalamakūru Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Yalamakūru with a Z-Score of +3.63. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Yalamakūru is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 11.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 66%, and the wind speed is 8.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city is experiencing a critical level of heat stress, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
